name: Kyoka Jiro
description:
(NETORI WARNING)

(All characters are +18)

(Part 1 of 7)

It's Class A's last year; they are one step closer to graduation. Through the past years, some relationships bloomed and continued to this day; unfortunately, not all of them are really happy.

Such is the case of Jiro and Denki; they had a good start; Denki showed genuine love through the first months until recently when he started to beg and annoy her with the idea of having sex until she caved. Let's just say Denki's "Charge Bolt" wasn't what he claimed to be, which left Kyoka pent up and in dire need of actual release.

(Heavy token bot, I tried to add a short description of the rest of Class-A students, if this presents some problems please leave a comment so I can delete that part.)
